task_completion.description: The Cancer iChart Archive app is opened
task_completion.visual_evidence: An application window with branding or title indicating 'Cancer iChart Archive' or 'Cancer Drug Interactions' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The cancer drug 'Abiraterone' is selected or entered
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Abiraterone' is visible in a search bar, selection list, or active filters specifically designated for cancer drugs.

task_completion.description: The co-medication 'Acenocoumarol' is selected or entered
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Acenocoumarol' is visible in a search bar, selection list, or active filters specifically designated for co-medications.

task_completion.description: The interaction result screen for the two drugs is displayed
task_completion.visual_evidence: A results page or popup is visible showing an interaction check specifically between 'Abiraterone' and 'Acenocoumarol'.

task_completion.description: The correct interaction status is shown
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'No Interaction Expected' and/or a prominent green color indicator (like a green traffic light icon or green highlighted box) is visible next to the interaction result.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Cancer iChart Archive app UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The selections and results are shown within the graphical user interface of the app, not in a text editor, notepad, or basic web search.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no open terminal windows executing scripts, curl commands, or API calls to fetch the interaction data.

integrity.description: The final result is natively rendered by the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'No Interaction Expected' text or green color is a native element of the app's result screen, not typed out by the agent in an unrelated text field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The cancer drug to select is 'Abiraterone'. The co-medication to select is 'Acenocoumarol'. The expected interaction status is 'No Interaction Expected', which is represented by a green color in the app's Traffic Light system.
